name: Page Transition
description: CSS-only page transition wrapper — morph (scale crossfade), fade, and slide variants.
accessibility_notes: ensure exiting content is aria-hidden during transition

activeKey.description: Unique key for the current page — changing it triggers the transition

className.description: CSS class for the container div

conflicts: absolute positioning during exit can cause layout shift if container lacks fixed height
usage_tip: Best for SPA page or tab transitions; set container height to avoid layout shift.
